name: Metroid
description: Nintendo sci-fi action-adventure franchise starring Samus Aran, built around exploration, upgrades, isolation, and alien worlds.

eras.title: Classic Exploration Era
eras.description: 2D exploration lineage from Metroid through Super Metroid and Fusion.

eras.title: Prime Era
eras.description: First-person adventure branch led by Retro Studios.

eras.title: Modern Revival Era
eras.description: Remakes and new entries restoring Metroid as an active Nintendo franchise.
